instance_reference.note: Trn3 is sold as UltraServer capacity blocks and long-term contracts; no standard per-instance on-demand listing exists.

price_note: AWS has NOT published standard on-demand, reserved, or spot hourly pricing for Trn3 instances (GA Dec 2025, sold via UltraServer capacity blocks / long-term contracts). All three tiers are therefore null. reference_estimate_usd_per_accelerator_hour = $1.80 is an AWS-quoted internal customer pricing equivalent per chip-hour reported by secondary press (May 2026); ac.pricing uses it only as a last-resort fallback and marks the block with price_source='reference_estimate'. A blog-claimed 'trn3.48xlarge ~$47.50/hr' was DROPPED: the cited instance shape does not match the official Trn3 UltraServer configurations (64/144 chips).
energy_note: AWS does not publish Trainium3 TDP; ~750W is a SECONDARY-ESTIMATE (reporting aligned with SemiAnalysis modeling), tier T3. utilization, PUE (1.15, assumption) and $0.10/kWh are ASSUMPTIONS, not measurements.

prices.derivation: No standard on-demand hourly price published for Trn3; UltraServers offered via Capacity Blocks and long-term contracts.
AWS-quoted internal customer pricing equivalent ~$1.80/chip-hour for Trainium3, reported by secondary press (May 2026). Not a public list price.

tdp.note: AWS does not publish Trainium3 TDP. ~750W from secondary reporting (spec table aligned with SemiAnalysis modeling); treat as approximate.

pue.note: ASSUMPTION. AWS does not publish fleet-average PUE.
